Welcome to Mahatma Gandhi Vidyalaya

A pillar of education in Sangli since 1967

Our Legacy of Excellence

Mahatma Gandhi Vidyalaya, Sangli is run under the banner of Abhinav Samaj Sudhar Shikshan Mandal, Sangli, established in 1967. For over five decades, our school has been a cornerstone of quality education in the Sangli region of Maharashtra.

We believe in the holistic development of every child — nurturing academic excellence alongside character, culture, and community values inspired by the great Mahatma himself. Our dedicated teachers, vibrant campus life, and strong community bonds make MGV a family.

From sports competitions to cultural programs, from science to social awareness — our students grow into confident, compassionate citizens ready for tomorrow's world.

57+
Years of Excellence
500+
Students Enrolled

Our Esteemed Chairman

Guided by visionary leadership and a lifelong commitment to education

Shri. Mulani Sir

Chairman, Abhinav Samaj Sudhar Shikshan Mandal | Sangli, Maharashtra

Our esteemed chairman has devoted his life to the cause of education and social reform in the Sangli district. Under his visionary leadership, Mahatma Gandhi Vidyalaya has grown from a humble beginning into a respected institution that has shaped thousands of young lives.

His belief in equal opportunity, quality education, and holistic development continues to inspire every member of our school family each day.

"सर्वोच्च जीवन विकास, यासाठी शिक्षण प्रयास।"
"Education for the highest development of life."

Why Choose Us?

What makes Mahatma Gandhi Vidyalaya special

📚

Academic Excellence

A rigorous curriculum aligned with Maharashtra State Board, taught by experienced and caring educators.

🏆

Sports & Activities

Active participation in inter-school sports, kabaddi, athletics, and more — building confidence and teamwork.

🎭

Cultural Programs

Rich cultural events celebrating Indian heritage, traditional days, national festivals, and social awareness drives.

👩‍🏫

Dedicated Staff

Our passionate teachers go beyond textbooks to mentor, guide and inspire every student in their care.

🌿

Safe Environment

A nurturing, inclusive and safe campus where every child feels valued, respected, and motivated to learn.

🌍

Community Values

Rooted in Gandhian ideals of truth, service and non-violence — values that guide our school ethos every day.

💻

Modern Facilities

Well-equipped classrooms, library resources, and access to digital learning tools for 21st-century education.

🤝

Parent Partnership

We believe parents are partners in education. Regular PTMs and open communication keep families connected.
